items.headline: Major Indices Close Higher Amid Mixed Economic Signals and Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: U.S. major stock indices concluded Thursday's trading session in positive territory, with the S&P 500 reaching an all-time high. The rally comes despite persistent geopolitical concerns in the Middle East, which led to some early-day pressure on markets and swinging oil prices. Investor sentiment was bolstered by news of a ceasefire extension with Iran and a robust earnings season for many S&P 500 companies. This digest provides actionable market insights and is not financial advice.

items.headline: United Rentals Surges on Strong Q1 and Raised Outlook
items.summary: Shares of United Rentals ($URI) climbed significantly after the company reported a solid first-quarter earnings beat and subsequently raised its full-year outlook, signaling continued strong demand across construction and industrial activities.

items.headline: Texas Instruments Jumps on Upbeat Guidance
items.summary: Texas Instruments ($TXN) stock saw a notable rise today, driven by a strong first-quarter earnings beat and an optimistic guidance for the upcoming period, indicating improving demand trends.

items.headline: West Pharmaceutical Services Shows Strong Performance
items.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services Inc. ($WST) ended the day with significant gains, reflecting positive market sentiment.

items.headline: Avis Budget Group Plummets Amid Downgrade Concerns
items.summary: Avis Budget Group ($CAR) experienced a sharp decline in its stock price, influenced by a JPMorgan downgrade due to valuation concerns.

items.headline: ASGN Incorporated Sees Significant Drop
items.summary: ASGN Incorporated ($ASGN) shares fell sharply during today's trading.

items.headline: Medpace Holdings Declines
items.summary: Medpace Holdings Inc. ($MEDP) saw a considerable drop in its stock value today.

items.headline: Technology, Communication Services, and Energy Lead Sectors; Real Estate Lags
items.summary: Information Technology, Communication Services, and Energy sectors were among the top performers today. Conversely, the Real Estate sector experienced declines. There is a noted rotation from the energy sector towards technology, driven by attractive valuations and strong earnings growth potential. Healthcare also shows early signs of rebound.

items.headline: Nasdaq Inc Reports Strong Q1 2026 Results, Beats Expectations
items.summary: Nasdaq Inc ($NDAQ) announced robust first-quarter 2026 financial results, with net revenue increasing 14% year-over-year to $1.4 billion, exceeding analysts' expectations. The company highlighted broad-based growth across all operational segments and increased its quarterly dividend.

items.headline: Middle East Tensions Continue to Influence Oil Markets
items.summary: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, particularly concerning the war in Iran and the Strait of Hormuz, continue to create uncertainty and cause swings in oil prices. President Trump's announcement of a ceasefire extension with Iran provided some relief, but the situation remains a key macro factor.

items.headline: Census Bureau Releases AI Adoption Data; Report Criticizes Trump's Tariffs
items.summary: The U.S. Census Bureau published new data from its Business Trends and Outlook Survey (BTOS), revealing insights into artificial intelligence (AI) adoption across various businesses. Separately, a report from the Joint Economic Committee criticized President Trump's tariffs, alleging harm to small manufacturers.

items.headline: Major Companies Report Q1 Earnings: Mixed Reactions for IBM, Tesla, American Airlines, Lockheed Martin, Keurig Dr Pepper, NewMarket
items.summary: Several major companies released their Q1 earnings. IBM ($IBM) saw its stock slide despite beating profit and revenue estimates, with investors focusing on decelerating software growth. Tesla ($TSLA) also fell despite better-than-expected results. American Airlines ($AAL) reported record Q1 revenue but a net loss. Lockheed Martin ($LMT), Keurig Dr Pepper ($KDP), and NewMarket Corporation ($NEU) also released their latest financial results.
